name: section_background
label: Section background
help_text: Pale blue uses theme section--pale; White uses section--white.

name: hubdb_table_id
label: HubDB table ID
help_text: Numeric table ID from HubDB settings.

name: hubdb_table_slug
label: HubDB table name (optional)
help_text: If set, loads by table name instead of ID.

name: filter_column
label: Filter column name
help_text: HubDB column slug (e.g. asset_type). Leave blank with Filter value blank to show all rows.

name: filter_value
label: Filter value
help_text: Must match cell value (e.g. PR, News). Comma-separated tags in one cell are supported.

name: pagination_query_param
label: Pagination query parameter
help_text: When multiple listings share one page, use unique values: press_page, news_page, or page.

name: section_anchor_id
label: Section HTML id (anchor)
help_text: Sets id on the section for deep links and pagination scroll (e.g. latest-press). Use lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only. Leave blank for a default from the pagination parameter.
